productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Brown Casual Lifestyle Shoe
description: CompositionBrown shoes with leather upper, phylon midsole, carbon rubber sole and high traction flexible outsole.shoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThis pair of semi-formal shoes from skechers in brown leather and slip-on style exudes sophistication. The combination of light and dark brown, with an elastic panel between the tongue and the upper ensures easy wear. The cushioned insole provides ample comfort, while the shock absorbing lightweight midsole makes the pair appropriate for use on hard indoor surfaces. The high traction flexible outsole supports your natural body movement and walking posture, while the zig-zag ridged carbon rubber outsole makes it easy to wear on rough terrain. The outsole also ensures solid grip on rough surfaces and uneven land.
